docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,069.29 FILED BY SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR. $1,009.84 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,076.84, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR. $1,009.84 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,120.84, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO REFLECT $111.00 COST INSTEAD OF $67.00, IN THE JUDGMENT, FILED. CORRECTION IS NUNC PRO TUNC TO 6/29/04.
FILING FEE IS SHOWN AS $22.00 IN THE CLAIM BUT ACTUAL PAYMENT IS $66.00 AS SHOWN IN THE REGISTER OF ACTION.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $37.26 ACCRUED INTEREST, $55.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, LUMAN MATHEW JR.
